text: McDonald's (Terminal 1, Floor 2, Location: Departure Area): Serves breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Average prep time: 5-8 minutes for hot items, 2-3 minutes for pre-packed meals. Price range: Low ($5-10). Open 06:00-23:00. Best time to visit: 10:00-11:30am (low crowd, fresh inventory). Payment: Card, Cash, Mobile.

Starbucks (Terminal 1, Floor 2, Near Gate A1): Premium coffee and pastries. Prep time: 4-6 minutes for specialty drinks. Price range: Medium ($3.50-8). Open 05:30-23:30. Loyalty program: 10% discount on all items with member card. Seating: 40 seats with WiFi availability.

Burger King (Terminal 1, Floor 2, Mid-Corridor): Burgers, sandwiches, hot meals. Prep time: 6-10 minutes. Price range: Low ($6-12). Open 06:00-23:00. Combo meal deal: -20% if you buy 2 items. Family-friendly with kids meal options. Takeaway recommended for speed.

KFC (Terminal 1, Floor 2, West Wing): Fried chicken, hot meals, combo boxes. Prep time: 7-12 minutes (peak), 4-5 minutes (off-peak). Price range: Low-Medium ($8-15). Open 06:00-23:00. Best for: Families, long layovers. Seating: 50+ with dedicated family section.

Costa Coffee (Terminal 1, Floor 2, East Corridor): Premium coffee chain with pastries and light meals. Prep time: 3-5 minutes for hot drinks. Price range: Medium ($4-7). Open 05:30-23:30. Discount: -15% for loyalty members. Best for: Quick energy boost, quiet seating area.

Pizza Hut (Terminal 1, Floor 2): Fresh pizza, pasta, Italian cuisine. Prep time: 12-15 minutes for made-to-order pizza. Price range: Medium ($10-20). Open 06:00-23:00. Family combo deal: -25% off 2+ pizzas. Not ideal if time is tight (prefer <20 min to boarding).

Subway (Terminal 1, Floor 2): Fresh sandwiches, customizable options. Prep time: 4-6 minutes. Price range: Low ($6-12). Open 06:00-23:00. Great for: Healthy, quick options. Vegetarian-friendly. Loyalty program: Free sub after 10 purchases.

Domino's (Terminal 1, Floor 2): Pizza delivery and takeaway. Prep time: 10-12 minutes. Price range: Low-Medium ($8-18). Open 06:00-23:00. BEST FOR: Groups with 30+ min boarding time. NOT suitable if <15 min to gate. Fast delivery available via app.

Samosa Corner (Terminal 1, Floor 2): Indian snacks and street food. Prep time: 3-5 minutes. Price range: Low ($3-8). Open 06:00-22:00. PERFECT FOR: Budget travelers, quick snacks, authentic flavors. Vegetarian options: 80%. Bestsellers: Samosas, Chaat, Dosa.

Sushi Express (Terminal 2, Floor 2): Fresh sushi, Japanese cuisine, quick service. Prep time: 2-4 minutes for pre-made items, 6-8 for special orders. Price range: Medium-High ($12-20). Open 06:00-23:00. Premium quality, suitable for business travelers and food enthusiasts.

First Class Lounge Restaurant (Terminal 2, Floor 3): Premium dining exclusively for First Class & Business passengers. Multi-cuisine buffet: Indian, Chinese, Mediterranean. Open 05:00-23:00. Complimentary beverages, premium wines, cold cuts. Average dining time: 30 minutes.

Louis Vuitton Duty-Free (Terminal 1, Floor 2): Luxury handbags, luggage, accessories. Price range: High ($500-5000+). Open 07:00-21:00. Tax-free shopping available for international travelers. Expert staff for styling advice. Exclusive airport collections.

Duty Free Shop (Terminal 1, Floor 2): Duty-free perfumes, cosmetics, liquor, cigarettes. Price range: Low-Medium ($10-300). Open 07:00-21:00. -30% discount on liquor for international travelers. Payment: All cards accepted.

WHSmith Bookstore (Terminal 1, Floor 2): Books, magazines, newspapers, stationery. Price range: Low-Medium ($3-50). Open 07:00-21:00. Bestseller section updated daily. Includes travel guides, children's books, tech magazines. Takeaway recommended.

TechZone Electronics (Terminal 1, Floor 2): Laptops, mobile phones, tablets, accessories. Price range: Medium-High ($50-2000). Open 07:00-21:00. Tech support available. Latest gadgets on display. USB-C charging cables and power banks bestsellers.

Gift Shop (Terminal 1, Floor 2): Souvenirs, local handicrafts, gift items. Price range: Low-Medium ($5-100). Open 07:00-21:00. Perfect for: Last-minute gifts, local memorabilia. Same-day gift wrapping available.

Gucci Premium Fashion (Terminal 2, Floor 2): Designer handbags, clothes, accessories. Price range: High ($800-8000+). Open 07:00-21:00. Exclusive airport-only collections. Premium styling consultation. Tax-free for international travelers.

Prada Designer Boutique (Terminal 2, Floor 2): Premium fashion, handbags, eyewear. Price range: High ($600-7000+). Open 07:00-21:00. Personal shopper available. Exclusive limited editions available only at airport.
Dior Fashion House (Terminal 2, Floor 2): Perfume, cosmetics, haute couture. Price range: Medium-High ($100-5000). Open 07:00-21:00. Fragrance testers available. Skincare and makeup experts on staff.

Burberry Premium Collection (Terminal 2, Floor 2): Designer fashion, trench coats, accessories. Price range: High ($400-3000). Open 07:00-21:00. Iconic Burberry check patterns. Personal styling services available.

Book World (Terminal 2, Floor 2): Extensive collection of books, e-readers, travel guides. Price range: Low-Medium ($5-80). Open 07:00-21:00. Reading lounge available. Same-day digital ordering for e-books.

Pharmacy (Terminal 1, Floor 1): Medicines, first-aid, health products, vitamins. Price range: Low-Medium ($5-50). Open 06:00-23:00. Licensed pharmacist on duty. OTC pain relief, cold medicine, digestive aids most popular.

Restroom Facilities - Terminal 1 (Multiple Locations): Men's & Women's facilities on Floors 0, 1, 2. Open 00:00-23:59. Features: Accessible stalls, baby changing tables, paper towels & hand dryers. Wait time: 1-3 min. Emergency call button available.
Drinking Water Stations: Located on all floors, Terminals 1 & 2. Open 24/7. Free filtered water. Multiple stations per floor for accessibility. Low queue times.
ATM Machines: Multiple ATMs on Floors 1-2 of both terminals. Available 24/7. Accept international cards. Fee: $2-5 per withdrawal depending on bank. Nearby ATMs: T1F2 (2 units), T2F2 (2 units).
Elevators / Lifts: Available on all floors, both terminals. Accessible for wheelchairs, strollers, luggage. Wait time: 1-2 minutes. Emergency phone inside each elevator.
WiFi Service: Free airport WiFi available throughout terminals. Network: AirportWiFi-Free. Speed: 10-50 Mbps. Connection stable near gates. Password-free, no registration required.
Mobile Charging Stations: Fast charging available at Gates A1, A3, B2, CC3. USB-A and USB-C ports. Charging time: 1-2 hours for 50% charge. Monitored by airport staff.

Information Desks: Located Floor 1 (T1) and Floor 1 (T2). Staff available 06:00-22:00. Services: Flight info, directions, lost baggage assistance. Average wait: 3-5 minutes. Multilingual support available.
Currency Exchange: Located Floor 1 & 2 (T1) and Floor 2 (T2). Open 06:00-22:00. Live exchange rates displayed. Commission: 2-3%. All major currencies accepted.

Emergency Exit - Terminal 1 North Wing: Direct exit to ground level. Clearly marked with illuminated exit signs. Emergency alarm: Red button. Average evacuation time: 4-6 minutes for full terminal. Used during emergencies or fire drills only.
Emergency Exit - Terminal 1 South Wing: Direct exit to ground level. Emergency slides for rapid evacuation. Marked with reflective signage. Meeting point: South Parking Area.

Medical Room Terminal 1 Floor 2: Staffed 24/7 by qualified nurses. First-aid kits, defibrillator (AED), oxygen available. Average response time: <2 minutes from any gate. For cardiac emergencies: Call airport security immediately.

Medical Room Terminal 2 Floor 2: Advanced medical facility with on-site doctor. Equipped for trauma, cardiac, respiratory emergencies. Emergency hotline: Dial *911 from any airport phone. Ambulance response: <5 minutes.
Safety Zone Terminal 1: Designated muster point during emergencies. Located east of Gate A5. Capacity: 500+ people. Assembly time target: 8 minutes. Follow airport staff instructions.

Security Office Terminal 2: Contact for lost property, suspicious activity reporting, security concerns. Open 05:00-23:00. Office location: Ground floor near main entrance. Non-emergency contact: Extension 1234.

Baggage Claim Area 1 Terminal 1 Floor 0: Carousels 1-3. Average wait time: 12-18 minutes from arrival. Busy hours: 09:00-11:00am. Lost baggage counter nearby. Tracking system displays carousel assignments.
Baggage Claim Area 2 Terminal 1 Floor 0: Carousels 4-6. Left Luggage secure storage available. Fees: $10/day first bag, $5/day each additional. Wait time: 10-15 minutes.

Lost Baggage Counter Terminal 1 Floor 0: Report lost or damaged bags immediately. Staff speaks 10+ languages. Process time: 15-30 minutes. Insurance claim forms available. Compensation depends on ticket type.
Baggage Belt 1 Terminal 1 Ground: International arrival conveyor. Operational 05:00-23:00. Status: Operational. Carousel speed: Adjustable. Average belt load time: 3-5 minutes after flight arrival.

Terminal 2 Baggage Claims 1-3 Floor 0: Premium baggage handling. Average wait: 8-12 minutes. Carousels 1-4, 5-8, 9-11. Concierge assistance for premium passengers available. Priority zone for First Class luggage.

RECOMMENDATION: Best Food Option for Gate A2 (5-10 min available): Samosa Corner offers authentic quick snacks in 3-5 minutes. Cost: ~$5-8. Alternative: Starbucks for coffee & pastry in 4 minutes (~$5-7). Avoid: Pizza Hut (12+ min).

RECOMMENDATION: Running Late to Gate A5? (Final call in 5 min): Take express north corridor route (3 min). Skip food entirely. Head directly to gate, no shopping. Probability of missing flight: 10-15% if you follow this route. Spare time: 2 minutes.

RECOMMENDATION: Budget Traveler with 45 min to boarding: Start with Samosa Corner ($6, 5 min) â†’ Use ATM ($2 fee, 3 min) â†’ Duty Free liquor (-30% sale, 10 min) â†’ Rest at gate. Total: 20 min, cost: ~$20. Remaining: 25 min buffer.

RECOMMENDATION: Premium Traveler with 90 min to boarding: Enter T2 VIP Fast Track â†’ First Class Lounge access â†’ Premium dining (30 min) â†’ Dior/Prada shopping (30 min) â†’ Gate AA2 priority boarding. Cost: ~$50+ (included in First Class fare). Experience rating: 4.8/5.

RECOMMENDATION: Family with Kids (2-hour layover): Secure baggage at Left Luggage T1 ($10) â†’ McDonald's family meal (20 min, $35) â†’ Kids Play Area T2 F2 (40 min, free) â†’ Book World (15 min, $10-20) â†’ Gate. Total: Budget-friendly, stress-free.

RECOMMENDATION: Business Traveler (30 min before boarding): Skip dining. Use: Currency Exchange (5 min, convert $50) â†’ Costa Coffee quick coffee (3 min, $5) â†’ WiFi check work emails (5 min) â†’ Gate. Save 17 min buffer for unexpected delays.

RECOMMENDATION: Avoid Peak Hours (11am-1pm, 4pm-6pm): These times have 40% longer security queues and corridor congestion. Alternative: Travel early morning (6am-9am) or mid-afternoon (2pm-4pm) for 50% shorter wait times and relaxed terminal atmosphere.

RECOMMENDATION: Connecting Flight T1â†’T2 (45 min connection): Use Skybridge (4 min) â†’ Direct to T2 Security (8 min) â†’ Proceed to Gate AA2 (5 min). Total: 17 min. Your luggage auto-transfers. Buffer: 28 min. Success rate: 95%.

RECOMMENDATION: Accessibility Routes for Elderly/Wheelchair: Always use Elevators (not escalators) â†’ Accessible restrooms on each floor (blue signs) â†’ Elevators connect all floors efficiently. Staff assistance: Call any Help Desk. Wheelchair available at entrance if needed.

RECOMMENDATION: International Traveler, New to Airport? Start at Information Desk (Floor 1, 3-min walk from security) â†’ Get free airport map (multilingual) â†’ Ask staff for gate-specific directions â†’ Ask about Terminal 2 if connecting. Staff speaks 10+ languages. Response time: <3 minutes.

RECOMMENDATION: Shopping on Budget (30 min, <$100): Duty Free liquor (-30%, $30-50) â†’ WHSmith book ($10-15) â†’ Gift shop souvenir ($15-20) â†’ Back to gate. Fast checkout at all stores. Tax-free for international travelers = Extra savings.

RECOMMENDATION: Luxury Shopping Experience (90 min, Budget Flexible): T2 Gucci/Prada exclusive collections (45 min, $2000-10000) â†’ Dior fragrance boutique (20 min, $200-500) â†’ Premium Lounge rest & refresh (25 min) â†’ Boarding. VIP Personal shoppers available. Checkout can be arranged in-lounge.

RECOMMENDATION: Emergency Medical Situation: T1 Medical Room (Floor 2, <2 min response) or T2 Medical Room (Floor 2, on-site doctor). Call *911 from any airport phone immediately. Defibrillator, oxygen, trauma kits available. Ambulance response: <5 minutes. Staff trained in CPR.

RECOMMENDATION: Lost Baggage Recovery: Report immediately to Lost Baggage Counter (T1 Floor 0 or T2 Info Desk). Provide: Flight number, baggage tag, flight date. Processing: 15-30 min. Insurance: Included with ticket. Compensation: $2000-5000 USD typical limit depending on airline policy.
